{{Expand}}

{{Infobox group
| name = Sarin
| introduced = tg-02-crimson-vault
}}

== The Crimson Vault ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|The [[Sarin]] possess natural agility.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c4">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 4</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Traveler's Gate nav}}

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:The Crimson Vault]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate groups]]
